info.title: Spektrix API
info.description: Spektrix is the market-leading CRM, ticketing, marketing and fundraising solution for theatres and the performing arts. This API provides access to events, customers, baskets, orders, and related resources.

get.summary: Returns the full address for a given ID
get.description: Returns the full address for a given ID

get.summary: Returns a list of addresses matching a given postcode. (UK Addresses only)
get.description: Returns a list of addresses matching a given postcode. (UK Addresses only)

get.description: Allows an agent to determine how much of their credit limit has been used, and how much remains.
